title: MARKETPLACE - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE MARKETPLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides locally grown food, cut flowers, and animal fiber. Limited alternative pick up and delivery options may be available. 485 Daily Lane Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Order request: Sunday 6am-Wednesday 6am Farm stand pick up: November-April Tuesday 3pm-6pm, May-October 4pm-7pm Alternative pick up locations/Delivery: Wednesday 8am-5pm locations vary Email (503) 304-3754 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3754 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by items. Accepts most forms of payment, including WIC, Senior Farm Direct Nutritional Vouchers, and SNAP/EBT Benefit cards. $5 delivery fee may apply. Cash and check are accepted if order is picked up at the farm stand. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 8am-4pm Services: Grocery Ordering/Delivery Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - KITCHEN RENTAL FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE
